ticket.title: Add a CHANGELOG entry policy
ticket.description: Every PR should add a line under `## Unreleased` in CHANGELOG.md. The specifier draft tries to edit CHANGELOG.md directly, which is outside the change folder allowed by the schema.

recordedFinalText: {"files":[{"path":"proposal.md","content":"# CHANGELOG entry policy"},{"path":"tasks.md","content":"- [ ] Add policy doc"},{"path":"CHANGELOG.md","content":"## Unreleased\n- Adopt policy"}],"openQuestions":[],"assumptions":[],"risks":[]}
